top_signals.reason: Boeing holds two massive NASA contracts totaling over $32B, both triggering the >$1B rule (+15 each) and cross-reference with 31 corruption indicators and social mentions on both awards (+25). Multiple contract signals on same ticker apply the 1.3x multiplier, producing a high-conviction score.

Howard Lutnick confirmed in Paradise Papers at 100% match score triggering +30pts offshore confirmed bonus. As Commerce Secretary, offshore entity exposure poses regulatory and reputational risk to BGC Partners and Cantor Fitzgerald holdings.

Boozman purchased two Treasury bond ETFs (IEF and IEI) on the same date, triggering multiple-signal multiplier — suggesting a deliberate defensive rotation into fixed income. Combined with base congressional trade score, the cluster warrants elevated attention as a potential macro rate signal.

Purchased same day as IEF by same senator, triggering multiple-signal multiplier on a defensive Treasury bond rotation. Cluster buying of short-to-medium duration Treasuries signals possible insider macro awareness.

Military construction appropriations bill HR8469 passed House and received in Senate, supporting defense infrastructure spending. Insufficient additional signals to cross-reference for a high-confidence trade.

Rex Tillerson confirmed in Paradise Papers at 100% match score but no active political role or recent trade signal to amplify. Score insufficient to trigger actionable move without cross-reference indicators.

Unusually high dark pool volume of 173,349 shares across 6,450 trades for Hyatt Hotels suggests institutional accumulation away from lit markets. No corroborating political signals but volume anomaly alone warrants a watch.
Trump Jr post referencing GOOGL engineer illegal trading scandal highlights regulatory and reputational risk. Signal is weak without corroborating political trade or contract data to warrant action.
Senate sale of eToro ahead of or shortly after IPO period warrants attention at notable size. No cross-reference signals or additional indicators to elevate score further.
Congressional purchase of small regional bank First Citizens Bancorporation; small size limits conviction. No additional cross-reference signals present to elevate.
Congressional purchase of JPMorgan Chase at minimal size; no corroborating signals or cross-references to amplify the base score.
Senate purchase of PepsiCo at moderate size with no additional corroborating signals; trade appears routine with no red flags.
Sale of S&P 500 Growth ETF in isolation; small size and no corroborating signals limit score to congressional base only.
Congressional purchase of Eaton Corp at minimal size; no additional signals or cross-references present to elevate beyond base score.
Bechtel is privately held so no actionable ticker exists; contract >$1B with DOE earns the base points but cannot be traded publicly. Flagged for awareness only.
